name: Florida Building Code (official portal)
extraction_hint: adopted edition banner (2023 FBC 8th Edition, 2021 I-Codes + ASCE 7-22); watch for the 9th Edition (2026) transition; single statewide code with local amendments

name: Florida Building Code amendments and declaratory statements search
extraction_hint: statewide amendments, errata, and declaratory statements between code cycles

name: Florida Building Code Residential 2023 (ICC Digital Codes, free viewer)
extraction_hint: free read-only viewer for FBC-R section numbers; cite sections, never copy text

name: Florida Product Approval system
extraction_hint: statewide product approval; HVHZ requires a Miami-Dade NOA; wind-borne debris opening protection

name: Miami-Dade Product Control (NOA) search
extraction_hint: High-Velocity Hurricane Zone Notice of Acceptance; TAS 201/202/203 impact protocols for Miami-Dade and Broward

name: Florida Statutes Chapter 553 (Building Construction Standards)
extraction_hint: statutory basis for the FBC; public domain state statute (may be cited and quoted)

name: NC OSFM building codes (current and past)
extraction_hint: 2018 NC Residential Code (2015 IRC) is enforced now; 2024 NC RC (2021 IRC) adopted but effective date postponed (earliest ~2027)

name: NC Building Code Council / Residential Code Council
extraction_hint: watch the 2024 code effective-date decisions and the new Residential Code Council certification timeline

name: NC OSFM news and press releases
extraction_hint: official announcements of code edition transitions and effective dates

name: North Carolina Residential Code 2018 (ICC Digital Codes, free viewer)
extraction_hint: free read-only viewer for NC RC section numbers (2015 IRC base); includes Chapter 45 High Wind Zones

name: NC Office of Administrative Hearings (rulemaking / NCAC)
extraction_hint: administrative rule adoptions affecting code effective dates; public-domain state records

name: International Residential Code 2021 (ICC Digital Codes, free viewer)
extraction_hint: model residential code both FL (2021 base) and pending NC 2024 derive from; cite sections R-numbers, never copy text or tables

name: International Energy Conservation Code 2021 (ICC Digital Codes)
extraction_hint: insulation R-value and fenestration tables by climate zone (N1102 / R402); cite sections, use the public-domain DOE BASC restatement for values

name: International Plumbing/Mechanical/Fuel Gas Codes (ICC Digital Codes)
extraction_hint: IPC (drain slope, DFU), IMC and IFGC references for plumbing/HVAC/gas; cite sections only

name: ICC Digital Codes library (all I-Codes landing)
extraction_hint: catches new I-Code editions and newly adopted state codes as they publish

name: NFPA 70 National Electrical Code (free access)
extraction_hint: NEC section numbers (210.52, 210.8, 210.12, 314.16, 240.4); free registered read-only; never copy text

name: UpCodes Florida (aggregated code viewer)
extraction_hint: secondary free viewer for FL adopted codes and amendments; cross-check against the official portal

name: UpCodes North Carolina (aggregated code viewer)
extraction_hint: secondary free viewer for NC adopted codes; confirm the enforced edition against OSFM
